name: GlobalFoundries Inc.
description: GlobalFoundries Inc. is one of the world's leading semiconductor manufacturers, providing a unique combination of design, development, and fabrication services. As a pure-play foundry, the company produces a wide range of feature-rich semiconductors for high-growth markets, including automotive, mobile devices, internet of things, and industrial applications. GlobalFoundries operates a global manufacturing footprint with facilities in the United States, Europe, and Asia, enabling it to deliver essential chips that power modern technology while focusing on specialized process technologies that offer power efficiency and high performance.
